title: tragia triandra var. genuina
intro: Tragia triandra var. genuina, also known as the Tragia genuina, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In terms of health benefits, the plant is believed to help reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Tragia triandra var. genuina can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
